summary: Complete testing of Codici Danno tag system and Archivio Sinistri dashboard features. Backend (16/16 tests passed) and Frontend (all UI features verified). Both new features are working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> - minor DOM nesting issue from dynamic rendering, inherited from previous iterations, does not affect functionality

backend_api.GET /api/perizie/codici-danno: PASS - Returns 7 damage codes with correct fields
backend_api.codici_danno fields: PASS - Each code has codice, categoria, label, norma, implicazione, azione, icon, color
backend_api.codici_danno codes: PASS - S1-DEF, S2-WELD, A1-ANCH, A2-CONC, P1-ZINC, G1-GAP, M1-FORCE
backend_api.codici_danno categories: PASS - Struttura, Ancoraggio, Protezione, Sicurezza, Automazione
backend_api.POST with S1-DEF+P1-ZINC: PASS - Generates structural cost items (B.01, not B.03)
backend_api.POST with A1-ANCH+A2-CONC: PASS - Generates ancoraggio items with rifacimento fori + malta tixotropica
backend_api.POST with M1-FORCE: PASS - Generates automazione items with collaudo EN 12453 (B.05, B.06)
backend_api.POST with G1-GAP: PASS - Generates sicurezza items with riallineamento EN 13241 (B.04)
backend_api.A.01 references codes: PASS - Cost item A.01 includes damage code references in description
backend_api.POST recalc uses codici_danno: PASS - Regenerates costs based on updated codici_danno
backend_api.PUT saves codici_danno: PASS - Field persists via GET verification
backend_api.GET archivio/stats structure: PASS - Returns total_count, total_amount, avg_amount, by_tipo, by_status, by_month, codici_frequency
backend_api.archivio/stats zero handling: PASS - Returns zeros/empty when no perizie
backend_api.archivio/stats aggregations: PASS - Correctly calculates by_tipo, by_status, codici_frequency

frontend_ui.7 damage code tags: PASS - All 7 tags visible with data-testid
frontend_ui.Category groupings: PASS - STRUTTURA, ANCORAGGIO, PROTEZIONE, SICUREZZA, AUTOMAZIONE labels
frontend_ui.Pill-shaped tags: PASS - Rounded buttons with color coding
frontend_ui.Tag color coding: PASS - Red (Struttura), Orange (Ancoraggio), Blue (Protezione), Yellow (Sicurezza), Purple (Automazione)
frontend_ui.Tag selection ring effect: PASS - Selected tags show ring-2 effect and darker background
frontend_ui.ISO norm badges: PASS - Shows ISO 1461 / ISO 12944 for P1-ZINC
frontend_ui.Tag toggle works: PASS - Click again to deselect removes ring
frontend_ui.Archivio Sinistri empty state: PASS - Shows 'Nessuna perizia nell'archivio' with button
frontend_ui.Archivio KPI cards: PASS - Perizie Totali, Volume Totale, Importo Medio, Codici Danno Usati
frontend_ui.Archivio monthly chart: PASS - Andamento Mensile bar chart visible
frontend_ui.Archivio status pie chart: PASS - Stato Perizie donut chart visible
frontend_ui.Archivio tipo breakdown: PASS - Per Tipo di Danno with progress bars
frontend_ui.Archivio codici frequency: PASS - Codici Danno Piu Frequenti with badges

critical_code_review_comments: calc_voci_costo correctly handles codici_danno to generate smart cost items based on selected damage codes
Codici Danno category flags (has_struttura, has_ancoraggio, etc.) correctly trigger appropriate cost items
Archivio Sinistri stats endpoint handles zero perizie gracefully with empty arrays/objects
Frontend tag selector properly groups codes by category with correct color coding
Norme attivate section dynamically updates based on selected codes using Set for unique norms
Minor React hydration warning (<span> inside <tbody>) inherited from previous iterations - does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Test perizia created with S1-DEF and P1-ZINC codes for Archivio Sinistri dashboard verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Codici Danno and Archivio Sinistri features fully tested. Key details: 1) GET /api/perizie/codici-danno returns 7 codes (no auth required). 2) calc_voci_costo generates smart cost items based on codici_danno categories. 3) Frontend tag selector at /perizie/new with pill-shaped buttons grouped by category. 4) 'Norme attivate' section shows activated norms. 5) Archivio Sinistri at /archivio-sinistri with KPI cards, charts (recharts), and code frequency. 6) Previous features tested: DDT (iter_25), Fornitori (iter_26), DDT Convert (iter_27), Perizia CRUD (iter_28), Genera Lettera (iter_29).
